scripts.build: VITE_API_BASE_URL= npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
scripts.lint: npm run lint:client && npm run lint:server
scripts.test: npm run test:client && npm run test:server && npm run test:e2e
scripts.audit: npm run audit:root && npm run audit:client && npm run audit:server
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run audit && npm run build && npm run test
